---
title: "Slides"
---

The presentation slides are available as a PDF download.

[Download Slides (PDF)](assets/slides.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

::: {.callout-note}
Slides are generated from `slides/main.tex` using LaTeX Beamer.
Run `pdflatex slides/main.tex` to compile.
:::

## Slide outline

1. Motivation — why study synthetic biology innovation trajectories?
2. Research question and hypotheses
3. Data — papers, patents, iGEM projects, and parts
4. Methods — embeddings, UMAP, HDBSCAN
5. Results — semantic clustering across artifact types
6. Case study — carbon capture in synthetic biology
7. City-level patterns
8. Discussion and limitations
9. Implications
